scripts.gas:use:little-leap: cp GAS/clasp-configs/little-leap.clasp.json GAS/.clasp.json && echo 'Switched to Little Leap'

scripts.gas:use:loyal: cp GAS/clasp-configs/loyal.clasp.json GAS/.clasp.json && echo 'Switched to Loyal'
